meta.title: Studio EIM — Game Audio Production House
meta.description: Since 1999, Studio EIM has produced audio for over 1,000 game titles. A premium game audio production house.

index.heroDesc: Premium game audio partner with over 1,000 titles since 1999
index.aiTitle: The Future of Sound with AI
index.ctaDesc: Music · SFX · Voice · Engine Integration — Your one-stop game audio partner

voice.heroDesc:
Game dubbing · Narration · AI voice data
27 years of voice production expertise
voice.overviewDesc: From casting to recording, editing, and engine integration — all in one place. We create voices that perfectly convey the emotions and world of your game characters.
voice.studioDesc: Our soundproof and vibration-isolated voice booths offer professional-grade monitoring. Detailed equipment specifications are shared under NDA during project meetings.
voice.processDesc: We deliver the best voice results through our structured 6-step process.
voice.ctaDesc:
From character voices to AI datasets,
we'll propose the optimal solution for your project.

music.heroDesc:
Orchestral · Electronic · Hybrid
Tailored music for every game world
music.ctaDesc:
Soundtracks that complete your game world —
crafted by EIM.

soundDesign.heroDesc:
Impact · Ambience · UI sounds
We design every sound the player experiences
soundDesign.ctaDesc: We create immersive game sound experiences.

interactive.heroDesc:
Middleware · Engine Integration · Interactive Systems
Sound that responds to player actions
interactive.ctaDesc:
We build interactive sound systems
that integrate seamlessly with game engines.

reviews.heroDesc: Real testimonials from clients we've worked with
reviews.ctaDesc: Experience the best game audio with EIM.
